title: 26AS shows TDS u/s 192 but Form 16 not uploaded — expected_missing

expected_output.reason: 26AS shows TDS u/s 192 from TAN BLRX12345A. Form 16 from this employer is expected but not uploaded.
expected_output.user_action: Request Form 16 Part A and Part B from your employer. Required to verify gross salary, exempt allowances, and TDS details.

notes: Form 16 is expected whenever 192 TDS appears in 26AS. Its absence does not halt the pipeline — the engine can infer salary from AIS and 26AS — but reduces confidence. The taxpayer is prompted to upload Form 16 to improve accuracy.
